# Documentation

# GitHub / Change Trace

- [ ] Commit history clearly describes the script change.
- [ ] Branch has been pushed to GitHub.
- [ ] Merge target is correct.

# Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Privacy/secret scan over changed files
- [ ] Manual validation noted below, or not needed.

-

# Safety Review

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private keys, or OAuth material.
- [ ] No raw Google Sheet/Form/Drive IDs.
- [ ] No personal names, personal emails, phone numbers, or cadet data.
- [ ] No local-only files such as `.clasp.json`, `.env*`, `.claude/`, `.DS_Store`, `dist/`, `node_modules/`, or `data/*`.

# Deployment Notes

- [ ] Production deployment requested or approved.
- [ ] Deployed with `npm run push`, or deployment not needed.
- [ ] Post-deploy validation completed, or documented as pending.
